message:
Concurrency: Implement transactional review submission

Refactored the review submission logic to prevent race conditions during high
concurrency approvals.

- Introduced transaction-aware database methods:
  - CreateReviewTx
  - CountReviewsByDecisionTx
  - HasReviewerAlreadyReviewedTx
  - UpdateRequestStatusTx (with optimistic locking on current status)
- Updated internal/core/review.go to execute the entire review workflow
  (duplicate check, creation, counting, status update) within a single
  database transaction.

This ensures that concurrent approvals cannot put the system in an inconsistent
state where a request has sufficient approvals but remains in Pending status.
